titleStmt.title: SII 9.623: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 623. (A.R. No. 733 of 1922.) ON A STONE SET UP IN THE COMPOUND OF THE RUINED MALLIKARJUNASVAMI TEMPLE AT ANANTAPURAM, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1468, Plavaṅga, Āshāḍha, ba. 3, corresponding to A.D. 1547 July 5, Tuesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Harapaṇṇa and other inhabitants of the village of Anantāpura in Āvinamaḍusīme, a district of Penugoṇḍe-rājya restored the dilapidated temple of the god Mallikārjunadēva in the village and that when a certain Timmadāsari, son of Kammāra Timmadāsari; claimed that the temple was his own, the people of the village, with Śrīnivāsāchārya at their head, paid a certain sum to the claimant and made the temple a common property of the villagers.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu(ḥ) . śrīgaṇādhipataĒṁ namaḥ
namastuṁgaśiraścaṁdracaṁdracāmara
cāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudaya
śālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1468 neya
plavaṁgasaṁvatsara Āśāḍha ba 3 lu śrīmanma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyarū pruthvīrājyaṁgai
yauttiralu penugoṁḍeyarājyada Āvinamaḍu
vina sīmege saluva śrīanaṁtāpurada Ūra muṁde
Atistānada guḍi khilavāgiralāgi Āvinama
ḍuvina gauḍagaḷu sēnabhōva prajegaḷa sanmatadali Ā khi
lavāda Atistānavanu jīrnōdhārava māḍi harapaṁṇa
gaḷu guḍiyanu kaṭisi śrīmallikārjunadēvara pra
tiṣṭenu māḍiralāgi Ā pūrvada Atistānake hākida kaṁ
ba kaṁmāra tiṁmadāsari maga tiṁmadāsari ba
ṁdu �yo pūrvada Atistānava taṁma taṁde tiṁmadāsa
ri hākidanu Eṁdu śrīnivāsayage hēḷalāgi Ā śrīnivāsa
Ācāraru taṁma mudreyanu takoṁḍu hākida
Ā tiṁmadāsarinu Āvinamaḍuvina staḷakke kaḷuhalāgi
staḷadavaru hēḷida vivara Ā tiṁmadāsari vopi Ati
stānakkāgi kaṭidaṁdu śivālayavanu nānu kaṭisabēku
Eṁdu sanmatavāgi Atistānake krayava tegedukoṁḍa
nu muṁde �yo guḍigu namagu saṁbadavillā
Eṁdu koṭa śilāśāsanakke Āru tapidaru Ācāreri
ge tapidavarū .
Digital edition of SII 9.623 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
